Name: BossPartsModelParam
Description:
Defines parameters related to model parts for Boss cuts.
Row ID links with BossPartsParam.

Fields.Name: Invalid Ragdoll Parts when Broken
Fields.Description: Which ragdoll parts to invalidate when broken.

Fields.Name: Invalid Hit Part when Broken: 1
Fields.Description: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Invalid Hit Part when Broken: 2
Fields.Description: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Invalid Hit Part when Broken: 3
Fields.Description: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Invalid Hit Part when Broken: 4
Fields.Description: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 4.

Fields.Name: SFX Group ID to Disable when Broken
Fields.Description: The SFX group ID to disable when broken.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 1
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 1 is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 2
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 2 is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 3
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 3 is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 4
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 4 is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 5
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 5 is enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Equipment: 6
Fields.Description: If enabled, the equipment in slot 6 is enabled.
